company.name: MediaForce
company.notes: Israeli media agency. Has Video Editor + AI Content Creator role.

research.status_summary: MediaForce (Holon, Israel) is actively operating and shows incremental hiring signals as of early 2026, with no reports of layoffs, acquisition, or pauses.
research.hiring_policy: No public visa sponsorship or EOR policy found; the company is Israel-based and in-office (Holon HQ), making remote/EOR arrangements unlikely for local roles like Video Editor and AI Content Creator. LinkedIn currently lists 3 open positions in Israel.
recent_news: ZoomInfo signals (Feb 2026) show MediaForce actively researching 'Recruiting' topics, with a score of 86 and 4 signals detected, suggesting active headcount planning.
Most recent hire logged: Jim White (Senior Sales Director, joined Jan 1, 2026), indicating continued expansion into sales/BD functions into the new year.
No funding rounds, acquisitions, or restructuring events detected across Crunchbase, ZoomInfo, or LinkedIn in the Apr–Jun 2026 window — company appears in steady-state operation.
research.growth_signal: MediaForce remains a small-scale ad-tech operator (~111 employees, ~$5M revenue) with modest organic headcount growth and no external funding trajectory visible.
research.fit_for_lior: The Video Editor + AI Content Creator role directly maps to Lior's Creative AI thread — MediaForce's performance-marketing / native-ad focus would leverage AI video tooling and content iteration skills, though the small company size and Israel-only on-site setup are limiting factors.
